dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION Recommended Dosage ( 2.1 ) CIC and OIC: 24 mcg twice daily. IBS-C: 8 mcg twice daily. See full prescribing information for dosage adjustment by indication and degree of hepatic impairment.
